name: get_historical_weather
description: Retrieves historical weather observations for a specific location and date. Supports selection of individual weather metrics such as temperature, precipitation, wind, humidity, and atmospheric pressure.

location.description: The location for which to retrieve historical weather data. Accepts city name, 'City, Country', or 'latitude,longitude' coordinates.
location.$comment: Historical data availability varies by location; rural areas may have limited coverage from nearby station interpolation.

date.description: The historical date to retrieve weather data for, in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be a past date.
date.$comment: Date-only format used since historical records are typically day-granularity aggregates. Future dates will return an error.

units.description: Unit system for temperature and wind speed measurements.
units.$comment: Consistent enum across all weather tools to allow units to be set once and reused.

metrics.description: List of specific weather metrics to include in the historical response.
metrics.$comment: Selective metrics reduce response payload; requesting only needed metrics improves performance for analytics pipelines.
